heading: Liability for acts of officers and agents
label: 22311 Liability for acts of officers and agents
text: The corporation is liable for the acts of its officers and agents acting within the scope of their authority.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2231136:3411., , .Oct. 15, 1962Pub. L. 87–817, § 1176 Stat. 932
